item.title: Private companies added 63,000 jobs in February, January revised to just 11,000 additions, ADP says
Middle East conflict poses fresh test to central banks as oil shock fuels inflation
item.description: Middle East conflict has posed a fresh test to central banks, with fears of an oil shock and renewed inflation risks changing their bid to shore up gr...

item.title: Why Iran should not count on allies Russia and China to come to its aid
item.description: Iran's closest allies, Russia and China, have not offered material support to it, exposing the hard limits of its "strategic" partnerships.

item.title: As Trump declares inflation tamed, Iran conflict threatens new price pressures
item.description: The conflict involving Iran threatens another price spike that could undermine the president's central case for lower interest rates.

item.title: Iran conflict: Where things stand, global responses — and what comes next
item.description: The U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran is extending into its third day with each side pledging escalation.
